Row.Text: Eras+
Eras+ Pacing
Vanilla
Leaves Age pacing unchanged by Eras+. Useful for testing or standard matches.
No Eras+ pacing changes are active.
Balanced Extended

Clearly stronger extended pacing. Higher Age thresholds and noticeably heavier tech/civic costs than Balanced Extended+, while repeatable future techs/civics still add Age Progress so Ages do not stall.
Extended single-player curve: tech costs 1.75x / 2.05x / 2.50x by age; civic costs 1.90x / 2.20x / 2.65x; light growth, unit, road, and Modern project tuning.
MP Pace
Shorter thresholds for multiplayer pacing, aiming to avoid long repeatable tech/civic stretches while keeping research slower than Standard.
Multiplayer curve: tech costs 1.35x / 1.50x / 1.75x by age; civic costs 1.45x / 1.60x / 1.85x; lighter Age thresholds than the extended presets.
Modern Stretch
Leaves Antiquity and Exploration unchanged, then strongly raises Modern Age thresholds and Modern tech/civic costs so the final age has room to breathe.
Modern only: Antiquity and Exploration stay vanilla; Modern tech costs 3.25x, civics 2.75x, and victory projects 1.60x.
Adds Age pacing presets for Civ VII: Vanilla, Balanced Extended, Balanced Extended+, Balanced Extended+ / Modern Stretch, MP Pace, or Modern Stretch.

Choose how Eras+ should change Age thresholds, tech and civic costs, repeatable future-tech/civic Age Progress, and Modern pacing. Balanced Extended+ is the recommended default. Best selected before starting a new game.
Balanced Extended+
Recommended default. Epic-style tech and civic costs with Standard-style production, growth, unit maintenance, and victory project costs. A lighter extended preset requested by players.
Recommended default: tech and civic costs are 1.50x in every age, while production, growth, unit maintenance, and victory projects stay close to Standard.
Balanced Extended+ / Modern Stretch
Balanced Extended+ pacing for Antiquity and Exploration, then strongly raises Modern Age thresholds and tech/civic costs so the final age has room to breathe.
Antiquity and Exploration use 1.50x tech/civic costs; Modern uses the Modern Stretch curve with 3.25x tech, 2.75x civics, and 1.60x victory projects.
Eras+ ({1_Profile}): {2_Current} / {3_Max} age progress
Eras+ pacing profile: {1_Profile}
Custom (per-age)
Set each age's length independently using the per-age options below.
Custom mode uses the per-age Antiquity, Exploration, and Modern length options selected during game setup.
Eras+ Antiquity Length
Antiquity age length when Eras+ Pacing is set to Custom.
Eras+ Exploration Length
Exploration age length when Eras+ Pacing is set to Custom.
Eras+ Modern Length
Modern age length when Eras+ Pacing is set to Custom.
